{"id":727,"date":"2026-07-11T00:00:16","date_gmt":"2026-07-11T00:00:16","guid":{"rendered":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/?post_type=trail&p=727"},"modified":"2026-07-17T06:21:34","modified_gmt":"2026-07-17T06:21:34","slug":"campagao-community-trail-manduang-minglanilla-2025-gpx","status":"publish","type":"trail","link":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/trails\/campagao-community-trail-manduang-minglanilla-2025-gpx\/","title":{"rendered":"Campagao Community Trail | Manduang, Minglanilla | 2025 GPX"},"content":{"rendered":"\n

This trail was documented in 2025. See the 2026 trail report<\/a> for the latest documentation.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

\n\n\n\n

Campagao Community Trail is a point-to-point community trail in Manduang, Minglanilla. The documented route passes through rolling hills, farms, and scattered hillside homes, providing early views of Naga, Minglanilla, and Talisay before continuing through a quiet rural landscape where signs of everyday life remain close to the trail.<\/p>\n\n\n

Trail Snapshot<\/h3>
MILD<\/div>View others \u2192<\/a><\/div>
\n
\ud83d\udcc5 Documented<\/span>December 2025<\/strong><\/div>
\ud83d\udccf Distance<\/span>~5 km (Point-to-Point)<\/strong><\/div>
\u26f0 Elevation Gain<\/span>379 m<\/strong><\/div>
\ud83d\udd52 Duration<\/span>1.5 - 2.5 hrs<\/strong><\/div>
\ud83d\udca7 Water<\/span>At least 1 liter<\/strong><\/div>
\ud83c\udf33 Shade<\/span>Limited<\/strong><\/div>\n
\ud83d\udc63 Surface<\/span>90% trail, 10% road<\/strong><\/div>
\ud83d\uddfa\ufe0f GPX<\/span>Supporter Access<\/a><\/strong><\/div> <\/div><\/div>\n\n\n\n

Access<\/h2>\n\n\n\n

The documented hike began from a jump-off accessible by a concrete road. Motorcycle parking was available along the road near the jump-off point, and no parking fee was observed during the hike. Private vehicles were able to access the trailhead. Public transportation was limited, while habal-habal services were available.<\/p>\n\n\n

Why this trail is rated Mild<\/h3>
\u2713 Moderate hiking distance<\/div>
\u2713 Sustained but manageable climbs or descents<\/div>
\u2713 Some steep sections may be present<\/div>
\u2713 Mobile signal may be intermittent or unavailable in some areas<\/div>
\u2713 Moderate route commitment<\/div><\/div>
\n\t\n\n \n\t\n\n \n\n \n\n \n\n \n\n \n\n <\/g>\n\t\n\t\n\n \n\n \n \n \n \n <\/g>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\n\n\n\n\t\n\t\t\t\n\n \n \n \n \n <\/g>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\n\n\n\n\n\n\t\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\n\n \n \n \n \n <\/g>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\n\n\n\n\t\n\t\t\t\n\n <\/g>\n\n \t\n \n\n \n\n \n \n \n \n\n\n\n\n\n \r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\n<\/g>\n\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \n\n\n\n\n\n \r\n\r\n\n<\/g>\n\n \t\n<\/svg>\n\n

On this trail:<\/span> stairs<\/a> \u2022<\/span> viewpoint<\/a><\/p><\/div><\/div><\/div>\n\n\n\n

Route Description<\/h2>\n\n\n\n

The route follows a well-trodden community trail through farms and scattered hillside homes, with a series of rolling climbs and descents rather than one sustained ascent. The trail is mostly open and has limited shade.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

The early section provides views overlooking Naga, Minglanilla, and Talisay City before continuing through farmland where houses become more scattered. Although there are sections without nearby homes, farming activity remains evident along the route.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

A small community is located a few meters before Campagao Peak. The documented route reaches this community by way of a long, steep staircase.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Trail Conditions<\/h2>\n\n\n\n

The hike took place on a cloudy morning. The trail was dry during the documented hike but may become slightly muddy and slippery after rain. Mobile signal was present throughout the hike, although it was intermittent in some sections.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Shade was limited because of the lack of large trees. No stores were observed along the route. Locals were encountered during the hike, and only a few insects were observed.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

The trail was well-trodden and easy to follow. Some narrow sections had moderate cliff exposure that was partially concealed by thick vegetation.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Additional Notes<\/h2>\n\n\n\n

This is a community trail and did not feel isolated. A few cows and dogs were encountered along the route.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Several motorcycles were observed parked near one of the houses in the community before Campagao Peak. However, the access route used by the motorcycles could not be determined. The documented route includes a long, steep staircase leading to the community, which would be difficult for motorcycles to ascend if approached in reverse. This suggests there may be another access route to the community.<\/p>\n","protected":false},"featured_media":730,"template":"","trail_location":[64],"trail_feature":[75,81],"trail_type":[101],"trail_difficulty":[103],"class_list":["post-727","trail","type-trail","status-publish","has-post-thumbnail","hentry","trail_location-minglanilla","trail_feature-stairs","trail_feature-viewpoint","trail_type-point-to-point","trail_difficulty-mild"],"_links":{"self":[{"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail\/727","targetHints":{"allow":["GET"]}}],"collection":[{"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail"}],"about":[{"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/types\/trail"}],"wp:featuredmedia":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/media\/730"}],"wp:attachment":[{"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/media?parent=727"}],"wp:term":[{"taxonomy":"trail_location","embeddable":true,"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_location?post=727"},{"taxonomy":"trail_feature","embeddable":true,"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_feature?post=727"},{"taxonomy":"trail_type","embeddable":true,"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_type?post=727"},{"taxonomy":"trail_difficulty","embeddable":true,"href":"https:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_difficulty?post=727"}],"curies":[{"name":"wp","href":"https:\/\/api.w.org\/{rel}","templated":true}]}}
